name: peering
title: AWS Transit — VPC Peering
summary: Creates VPC peering connections (same-region auto-accept or same-account cross-region), DNS resolution options, and optional route injection on both sides.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: peerings
module.type: map(object({ requester_vpc_id = string accepter_vpc_id = string peer_region = optional(string) auto_accept = optional(bool, true) allow_requester_dns_resolution = optional(bool, true) allow_accepter_dns_resolution = optional(bool, true) requester_route_table_ids = optional(list(string), []) requester_destination_cidr = optional(string) accepter_route_table_ids = optional(list(string), []) accepter_destination_cidr = optional(string) }))
module.description: Map of VPC peering connections keyed by logical name. auto_accept only works for same-account, same-region peering; cross-region peering is accepted by the accepter resource in this module (same account), and cross-account peering requires a provider alias in the consumer root — out of scope here. Route injection is optional per side.

outputs.name: connection_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical peering name to VPC peering connection ID.

outputs.name: connection_status
outputs.description: Map of logical peering name to acceptance status.
